chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Transfer Appln.No.S-31 of 2024. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For the hearing of the main case. 15.07.2024 Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, Advocate for the applicants. Complainant/Respondent Qadir Bux in person. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, D.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = 01. Over-ruled. 02. By way of the instant application under section 526 Cr.PC, the applicants sought transfer of their case to any of the Court of competent jurisdiction at Larkana, mainly for the reason that they are apprehending danger to their lives while attending the Court at Shikarpur. Nothing has been brought on record which may suggest that the applicants are having genuine apprehension for their lives while attending the Court at Shikarpur. The instant application has been filed only to defeat the early disposal of the case, which is of 2020. No criminal case could be transferred from one to another district based on self-procured grounds. Consequently, the instant application is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E
